task: Find healthy savory vegan snack recipes which can be cooked within 5 minutes and contain a high level of protein.
final_result_response:
I now have all the content from Healthline's vegan snacks article. Let me now identify the snacks that are **savory**, **high protein**, and can be prepared in **under 5 minutes**, and present them clearly.

## Healthy Savory Vegan Snack Recipes from Healthline — High Protein & Ready in 5 Minutes or Less

I navigated to **https://www.healthline.com/**, used the search and recipe features, and accessed the archived Healthline article *"24 Healthy Vegan Snack Ideas"* (healthline.com/nutrition/vegan-snacks). Below are the best **savory**, **high-protein** vegan snacks that can be assembled or prepared in **under 5 minutes**:

---

### 🥗 1. Edamame With Sea Salt
- **Protein:** ~17g per cup (155g) — excellent high-quality plant protein
- **Prep Time:** Under 5 minutes (microwave to thaw/heat frozen edamame)
- **How to Make:** Thaw or microwave frozen edamame pods, sprinkle with sea salt or a dash of soy sauce. Chew the pods gently to eat the beans inside.
- **Why It's Great:** One of the highest plant-protein snacks available — savory, satisfying, and incredibly quick.

---

### 🥣 2. Hummus and Veggies
- **Protein:** ~5g per serving (chickpeas-based)
- **Prep Time:** Under 5 minutes (use store-bought hummus + pre-cut veggies)
- **How to Make:** Pair store-bought hummus (made from chickpeas, tahini, olive oil, garlic, lemon) with raw carrot sticks, celery, cucumber, or radishes.
- **Why It's Great:** Hummus is high in fiber, healthy fats, B vitamins, and protein. A savory, crunchy, and nutritious combo.

---

### 🫘 3. White Bean Dip and Pita/Crackers
- **Protein:** ~5g per ¼ cup (50g) of white beans
- **Prep Time:** Under 5 minutes (use canned/store-bought white bean dip)
- **How to Make:** Scoop store-bought white bean dip (cannellini beans blended with olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and herbs) and pair with whole grain crackers or pita bread.
- **Why It's Great:** White beans are iron-rich and protein-packed — a savory, hearty snack requiring zero cooking.

---

### 🍿 4. Popcorn With Nutritional Yeast
- **Protein:** Nutritional yeast is a **high-quality complete plant protein** rich in B vitamins and zinc
- **Prep Time:** 2–3 minutes (microwave popcorn or air-popped)
- **How to Make:** Pop popcorn in microwave or air popper, then immediately toss with nutritional yeast flakes and a pinch of salt.
- **Why It's Great:** Nutritional yeast adds a savory, cheesy flavor along with a major protein boost. A 2-cup serving of air-popped popcorn has ~10% DV of fiber at only 62 calories.

---

### 🥑 5. Guacamole and Whole-Grain Crackers
- **Protein:** Avocados provide healthy fats; boost protein by adding a sprinkle of hemp seeds
- **Prep Time:** Under 5 minutes (use store-bought guacamole or quickly mash an avocado with lime and garlic)
- **How to Make:** Mash ripe avocado with lime juice, garlic, and onion. Serve with 100% whole-grain crackers.
- **Why It's Great:** Rich in monounsaturated fats, fiber, and potassium — savory and filling.

---

### 🌿 6. Rice Cakes with Avocado & Sesame Seeds
- **Protein:** Enhanced by toasted sesame seeds (which add protein and healthy fats)
- **Prep Time:** Under 2 minutes
- **How to Make:** Spread mashed avocado on brown rice cakes and top with toasted sesame seeds, salt, and pepper.
- **Why It's Great:** A light but nutrient-dense savory snack — quick, satisfying, and completely plant-based.

---

### 🥜 7. Spiced Nuts (Store-Bought or Pre-Made)
- **Protein:** ~6g per oz (23g) for almonds
- **Prep Time:** 0 minutes (grab and go from a pre-made batch or store-bought bag)
- **How to Make:** Choose pre-spiced almonds, cashews, or mixed nuts with minimal added ingredients (no excess salt/oil).
- **Why It's Great:** All nuts are high-protein, healthy-fat vegan snacks — savory varieties (rosemary, sea salt, chili) are widely available.

---

> 📌 **Source:** Healthline — *"24 Healthy Vegan Snack Ideas"*, Written by Lizzie Streit, MS, RDN, LD
> Archived version accessed at: https://web.archive.org/web/20250115070402/https://www.healthline.com/nutrition/vegan-snacks
> *(Note: The live Healthline site was temporarily returning 403 errors during this session due to CloudFront traffic blocking; the cached Wayback Machine version was used to retrieve the full article content.)*

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The task requires finding healthy savory vegan snack recipes that: (1) can be cooked/prepared within 5 minutes, (2) are high in protein. The agent should identify and present specific recipes or snack ideas meeting these criteria.

**Output Assessment:** The agent produced a list of 7 healthy savory vegan snack recipes with high protein content and preparation times under 5 minutes: Edamame With Sea Salt (~17g protein), Hummus and Veggies (~5g), White Bean Dip and Pita (~5g per 1/4 cup), Popcorn With Nutritional Yeast, Guacamole and Whole-Grain Crackers, Rice Cakes with Avocado & Sesame Seeds, and Spiced Nuts (~6g per oz). Each entry includes protein information, prep time, preparation instructions, and reasoning for inclusion. The source was the archived Healthline article "24 Healthy Vegan Snack Ideas" (accessed via Wayback Machine due to live site 403 errors).

**Evidence:** Step files confirm the agent genuinely accessed the Wayback Machine archived version of the Healthline "24 Healthy Vegan Snack Ideas" article. Steps 50-52 show real content extraction via BeautifulSoup, with the article text including all 24 snack items being parsed. The article content was real (authored by Lizzie Streit, MS, RDN, LD), and the agent appropriately filtered the 24 snacks down to 7 that are specifically savory, high-protein, and preparable in under 5 minutes. The live Healthline site returned repeated 403 errors (steps 30-46), but the agent correctly pivoted to the archived version. Execution integrity is "degraded" but meaningful browser interaction was confirmed, and the content extraction steps show genuine article data.

**Summary:** The agent successfully retrieved a real Healthline article on vegan snacks via the Wayback Machine, extracted the full content, and filtered it to present 7 genuinely savory, high-protein vegan snacks preparable in under 5 minutes — fulfilling all criteria of the task with legitimate sourced content.
